rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when referring to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
For output assignments, use existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in type scope contracts
Write output dependency guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use implementation-level assignments to bind subcomponent outputs when needed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
